arts.ttl: ‘At this moment in time’: Journalist shares what he’s now hearing about Tottenham signing a new centre-back
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have a defensive crisis on their hands right now. There’s no getting around it, Spurs’ defence is a mess at the minute. Archie...

arts.ttl: Everton spending inquiry closed with no further deduction of points
arts.sum: Everton avoided another points deduction when a complaint brought by the Premier League regarding spending rules was discontinued on Friday. The league and Everton said in a joint statement that the club will face “no further action” related to the period ending the 2022-23 season.

arts.ttl: Everton learn fate over Premier League PSR charges
arts.sum: Everton will face no further action from the Premier League after resolving all outstanding Profit and Sustainability Rules charges levelled against them.

arts.ttl: Premier League: Predictions for all ten of this weekend's games
arts.sum: Aaron Ashley has picked out a score prediction for all 10 Premier League matches taking place on Saturday, Sunday and Monday.

arts.ttl: Charlie Adam makes Everton pitch as David Moyes considers ex-Liverpool man for coaching role
arts.sum: Charlie Adam says he is 'fascinated' by experienced managers such as Everton's David Moyes and is keen to learn from them as he seeks to chart a career in management

arts.ttl: Everton to face no further action over PSR issue
arts.sum: Everton will face no further action from Premier League over an outstanding issue relating to a breach of its financial rules.

arts.ttl: Can you name our 25 Premier League goalscorers against Everton at Goodison Park?| Tottenham Hotspur
arts.sum: On Sunday, we travel to Goodison Park for the final time in the Premier League, but can you name the players to have scored a Premier League goal there for us? So, ahead of Sunday's landmark occasion, we are asking you to name every player who has scored for us in the Premier League at Goodison Park.

arts.ttl: Tottenham XI vs Everton: Confirmed team news, predicted lineup and injury latest for Premier League
arts.sum: Spurs look to bounce back from derby defeat but injury list still significant

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou defends Tottenham’s lack of activity in transfer market
arts.sum: Spurs are 14th in the Premier League and with at least seven key players absent for Sunday’s trip to Everton.

arts.ttl: Everton and Premier League release joint statement over outstanding PSR issue
arts.sum: The Premier League will not seek to prosecute Everton over an outstanding financial issue
